summary: Matched several Super Scope item functions in itsscope.c, replacing placeholders for it_80291CF4, it_80292030, itSscope_UnkMotion3_Coll, and itSscope_UnkMotion3_Phys. The PR also refined itSScopeAttributes by splitting the initial padding to expose x4 and x8 fields needed by it_80291CF4, and updated the itsscope.h prototype for it_80291CF4 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to s32 with typed parameters.
what_changed: Implemented it_80291CF4 as a typed s32 function taking Item_GObj* and s32, reading itSScopeAttributes fields x4 and x8 to return 0, arg1 / 8, or 9 depending on threshold checks.
Implemented it_80292030 to zero all three components of Item.x40_vel, call it_8026B390, and transition/update the item animation with Item_80268E5C(gobj, 0, ITEM_ANIM_UPDATE).

Implemented itSscope_UnkMotion3_Coll to branch on GET_ITEM(gobj)->xD4C: if nonzero it calls it_8026E15C with it_80292030 cast to an HSD_GObj callback and returns false; otherwise it returns it_8026DF34(gobj).
Implemented itSscope_UnkMotion3_Phys to apply fall physics using ItemAttr.x10_fall_speed and x14_fall_speed_max via it_80272860, then call it_80274658 with it_804D6D28->x68_float.
Changed itSScopeAttributes layout from a single 0x34-byte padding block to pad_x0[0x4], s32 x4, s32 x8, pad_xC[0x28], and existing Vec3 x34.
Updated itsscope.h declaration for it_80291CF4 from unknown return/params to s32 it_80291CF4(Item_GObj*, s32).
Added includes for it/forward.h and it/itCommonItems.h so itsscope.c could use typed item and attribute declarations.
smart_moves: Exposed only the attribute fields required for the matched logic while preserving the known offset of Vec3 x34 at 0x34, avoiding unnecessary over-structuring.
Used GET_ATTRS(GET_ITEM(gobj)) directly where only the attributes were needed, reducing temporary variables in a way that likely helped match codegen.
Preserved callback compatibility in itSscope_UnkMotion3_Coll by casting it_80292030 to void (*)(HSD_GObj*) for it_8026E15C.
Reused existing generic item physics helpers, including it_80272860 and it_80274658, instead of inlining behavior.
Tied header prototype improvements directly to a matched implementation, converting an unknown symbol signature into a typed declaration only when evidence was available.
decomp_lessons: When matching item functions, small struct discoveries often unlock codegen: here x4 and x8 in itSScopeAttributes were needed to express it_80291CF4 cleanly.
Keep partially known structs offset-safe by splitting padding around newly identified fields instead of renaming or moving existing known members.
Velocity reset routines may need explicit per-component zero assignments before calling common item state/animation helpers to match the original ordering.
Collision callbacks may require function pointer casts when the callee expects HSD_GObj* callbacks but the local function is typed with Item_GObj*.
Typed prototypes in item headers should be updated alongside matched bodies to reduce future UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS usage.
naming_conventions: Newly identified but semantically unclear struct fields were named by offset, x4 and x8, consistent with existing decomp practice when meaning is unknown.
Padding fields were named pad_x0 and pad_xC to document offsets after splitting a larger anonymous padding block.
Existing unmatched function names retained address-based identifiers such as it_80291CF4 and it_80292030 when no semantic name was established.
Motion callback names followed the existing item convention itSscope_UnkMotionN_Anim/Phys/Coll.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used direct macro access patterns such as GET_ATTRS(GET_ITEM(gobj)) and (GET_ITEM(gobj))->xCC_item_attr to shape temporary variable usage.
Matched threshold logic in it_80291CF4 using ordered comparisons: arg1 <= attrs->x4, then arg1 < attrs->x8 * 8, else fallback return 9.
Zeroed z, y, then x velocity components in it_80292030, preserving the source order shown in the diff.
Used ITEM_ANIM_UPDATE for the animation update argument in it_80292030 instead of a raw literal.
Matched physics functions by passing ItemAttr fall speed and max fall speed fields directly into it_80272860.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR body stated that itSscope_UnkMotion3_Coll, itSscope_UnkMotion3_Phys, it_80292030, and it_80291CF4 were matched 100%.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename itSScopeAttributes fields x4 and x8 to semantic names.
Search for remaining placeholders in src/melee/it/items/itsscope.c, especially it_80291D38, it_80291DAC, it_80291F14, and it_80291FA8.
Compare other item collision callbacks using it_8026E15C with typed Item_GObj to HSD_GObj callback casts.
Look for other item attribute structs where a large padding block was split to expose fields while preserving known offsets.
